schedule_constraints: Patient 3 visits the emergency department every day at 6am, and leaves the emergency department after the doctor is done seeing them
name: Patient 8
role_description: Patient 3 is a hospital patient in the emergency department. Not part of the emergency department staff. They must follow instructions from medical staff to receive treatment in different areas, being moved around areas like the waiting room, triage room, major injuries zone, minor injuries zone, and the operating room. Should not move until told so by someone else.
current_state: Patient 3 just arrived at emergency department. Patient is experiencing shortness of breath with wheezing and chest tightness, making it hard to speak full sentences and causing anxiety. Pain on scale is 6. Now waiting for treatment
work_pattern: Patient 3 is at emergency department all day until treated
act_description: conversing about Doctor 1 asking Patient 8 in the ER about the onset and main concern of symptoms, and Patient 8 reporting shortness of breath since early morning with chest tightness, wheezing, difficulty speaking full sentences, and anxiety about not being able to catch their breath
chat: Hi, I’m Dr. 1—what brought you into the ER today? When did it start, and what’s the main symptom that’s worrying you most right now?

Hi, doctor. Since early this morning I’ve been really short of breath—my chest feels tight and I’m wheezing, and it’s hard to get a full sentence out without stopping. It’s making me pretty anxious, like I can’t catch my breath.
